query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mismatch_annotations` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `claim_id` int NOT NULL,
  `assessment_id` int NOT NULL,
  `mismatch_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `mismatch_index` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `action` enum('confirm','dismiss') NOT NULL,
  `note` text,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_role` varchar(64),
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  INDEX `idx_ma_claim` (`claim_id`),
  INDEX `idx_ma_type` (`mismatch_type`),
  INDEX `idx_ma_user` (`user_id`),
  INDEX `idx_ma_action` (`action`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mismatch_annotations` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `claim_id` int NOT NULL,
  `assessment_id` int NOT NULL,
  `mismatch_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `mismatch_index` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `action` enum('confirm','dismiss') NOT NULL,
  `note` text,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_role` varchar(64),
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  INDEX `idx_ma_claim` (`claim_id`),
  INDEX `idx_ma_type` (`mismatch_type`),
  INDEX `idx_ma_user` (`user_id`),
  INDEX `idx_ma_action` (`action`)
);
